# Third-party MM0 parser fixtures

These files are copied from ignored `third_party/` checkouts so parser tests
can be committed without depending on local upstream checkout contents.

- `aufbau_pass_def.mm0`
  - source: `third_party/Aufbau/tests/proof_cases/pass_def.mm0`
- `aufbau_pass_normalize_identity.mm0`
  - source: `third_party/Aufbau/tests/proof_cases/pass_normalize_identity.mm0`
- `mm0_hello.mm0`
  - source: `third_party/mm0/examples/hello.mm0`
- `mm0_peano.mm0`
  - source: `third_party/mm0/examples/peano.mm0`
